name: Context Lookup
description: Registers a single function-call style tool `context_lookup` that lets agents fetch shared context, tool docs, and topic-indexed knowledge on demand. Replaces the auto-injection model of progressive-context with an explicit, agent-driven query model.

topicsFile.description: Path to the topic registry JSON file, relative to workspace root. Defaults to 'topics.json'.

toolName.description: Override the registered tool name. Defaults to 'context_lookup'.

maxBytes.description: Maximum bytes returned per lookup. Files larger than this are truncated with a note. Defaults to 64000.

skipAgents.description: Agent IDs to skip — the tool will not be registered for these agents.
